title: Python module 'pandas' not found due to SSL certificate issue
symptom: When executing a Python code node that requires the 'pandas' module, n8n throws a 'ModuleNotFoundError'. This indicates that the module is not installed despite being included in the Pyodide distribution.
applies_when: Company network has SSL certificate validation issues
not_this_if: Running in an environment without SSL issues
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n instance is unable to download the required Python packages due to SSL certificate validation failures caused by company networking restrictions. This prevents the automatic installation of the 'pandas' module.
fix_steps: Pass custom SSL certificates to the Docker container running n8n
Ensure that the network settings allow for SSL validation
Retry executing the Python code node
agent_instruction: Configure the Docker container to use custom SSL certificates and retry the execution.
